title: Create Planetary Tweaks
description: adds items and tweaks for Create Planetary modpack
body:
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7f71cfc7cc2daeea2f38845c110ec832f5dac9d.png)

Features might come and go depending on changes needed for my modpack. 
![promo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ee043e90f55017f5c40733d921fb95b16d29853.png)
Latest version of the mod adds:

Brass and Zinc Tools (does not add the ingot itself, recipes and items will only load if Create is loaded and Create Stuff Additions is not)
Copper Tools (recipes and items will only load if Create Stuff Additions is not loaded)
Void Worm Armor & Tools (recipes and items will only load if Create & Alex's Mobs is loaded)
Desh, Calorite, Ostrum Armor & Tools (does not add the ingot itself, recipes and items will only load if Ad Astra is loaded)
Unstable Ice Shard (recipes and items will only load if Create & Ad Astra is loaded)
Serene Seasons season items for patchouli book usage (recipes and items will only load if Serene Seasons is loaded)
 

More things have been added in the latest patches, but I am too lazy to write them all down in detailed form. I recommend downloading to see. New armor and Tools were added, same for items for recipes, and tooltips

 ![items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/427f7ddefdeb84dd4a73bd790409fa2d37f048e3.png)
![items2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a23a4a4b20c05c0c6e04b22018a065bd83cc4b64.jpeg)
